subcodes.title: Answer to the son of Mulla ‘Ali-i-Nuri (Kayfiyyata’l-Mi’raj)
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath manifested Himself within and through existing realities by virtue of the theophany of His Divine Will
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. الحمد لله الذی تجلی للممکنات بظهور المشیة لها بها لیعرفن کل الممکنات
subcodes.subjects: @realms of being; three realms; five realms, @limits of the intellect, @station of the Manifestation of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
